```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement service reliability engineering practices"
---
# Site Reliability Engineering
## Task
Apply SRE practices for service reliability.
## Requirements
1. Define and track SLOs. 2. Implement error budgets.
3. Automate toil reduction. 4. Conduct post-incident reviews.
5. Balance reliability with feature velocity.
## Constraints
- Error budget policy agreed with stakeholders. Toil budget < 50%. Blameless post-mortems.
## Success Criteria
- SLOs tracked. Error budgets managed. Toil reduced. Post-mortems drive improvements.
```
